data.title: Canaan Inc. to deliver 6,840 A15Pro miners to Cipher Mining's Black Pearl site to boost hashrate and meet demand.
data.description: Canaan Inc. has confirmed an agreement to supply 6,840 Avalon A15Pro miners to Cipher Mining's Black Pearl facility. The move is intended to bolster the facility's hashrate and address the increasing need for high-performance mining solutions.

data.title: Netflix reports 'shockingly strong' Q2 retention and subscriber comeback, driven by content like 'Squid Game' and ad-tier; analyst says.
data.description: Analyst Alicia Reese from Wedbush Securities reported that Netflix's subscriber engagement is strong, with high retention rates in the second quarter. Despite recent price hikes, particularly in the Premium Tier, user stickiness remains high due to the new ad-supported tier allowing users to downgrade instead of canceling. Many returning subscribers were attracted by the content, with programming volumes recovering from disruptions caused by last year. This positive retention trend is reflected in Netflix's stock price (NASDAQ: NFLX).

data.title: Bitcoin's 'golden cross' sparks 2000% gains as the 2025 daily golden cross delivers classic BTC price hikes.
data.description: Investors in Bitcoin are eagerly watching as the daily golden cross for 2025 begins to show positive results, a trend that historically led to significant price increases for BTC. Past instances of this event have seen gains of over 2,000%.
